decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing sacrifice effects and removal spells to control the opponent's board while generating value through cards like Ichor Wellspring and Lembas. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by constantly recurring threats like Writhing Chrysalis and Sagu Wildling while disrupting their game plan with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Skred. The inclusion of cards like Avenging Hunter and Troll of Khazad-dûm provides additional threats for the late game. The mana base is designed to support a variety of colors while also maximizing the value of cards like Khalni Garden and Twisted Landscape.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of cheap creatures, counter spells, and removal spells. The main win condition is to stall the game out until the opponent runs out of resources, while also using Gates to fix mana and gain incremental advantages. With a solid creature base and card draw options, this deck aims to outlast opponents and grind out victories through attrition. The control strategy is further supported by defensive spells like Prismatic Strands and Journey to Nowhere to keep the opponent's threats in check.

This deck focuses on deploying artifact creatures quickly and efficiently to create a strong board presence. It utilizes various artifact spells and lands to support the aggressive strategy, while also including cards that provide card draw and removal options to maintain tempo. With a mix of powerful creatures like Myr Enforcer and strong removal spells like Galvanic Blast, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of efficient threats and disruptive plays.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of small creatures, known as "weenies," and quickly deal damage to the opponent's life total. By utilizing cards like Kor Skyfisher, Leonin, and Raffine's Informant to generate tokens and pump up your creatures with cards like Thraben Charm and Guardians' Pledge, you can create a fast and aggressive board presence. Additionally, cards like Prismatic Strands and Orzhov Basilica provide some protection and flexibility in combat situations. Overall, the goal is to outpace the opponent and win the game through efficient creature aggression.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control cards and Gates to outvalue opponents in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format. By establishing board presence with creatures like Sacred Cat and Squadron Hawk, and interacting with spells like Counterspell and Prismatic Strands, the deck aims to control the pace of the game until it can generate an advantage with the Gate lands. Additionally, cards like Lórien Revealed and Thraben Charm provide additional utility and removal options to keep the opponent at bay while establishing dominance on the battlefield.

The main focus of this Pauper Aggro-Burn deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with low-cost creatures while using burn spells and direct damage to finish them off. By utilizing cards like Kessig Flamebreather, Sneaky Snacker, and Voldaren Epicure, along with spells such as Fiery Temper, Lightning Bolt, and Fireblast, the deck aims to deal consistent damage to the opponent while maintaining board presence. Faithless Looting helps with card draw and grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide added value by generating extra resources for more powerful plays.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent with a mixture of creature attacks and burn spells. Utilizing low-cost creatures and efficient burn spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. With a high number of direct damage spells and creature abilities that deal damage, this deck aims to finish off the opponent swiftly while maintaining card advantage through spells like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing efficient threats like Kessig Flamebreather, Sneaky Snacker, and Voldaren Epicure, as well as powerful burn spells like Fiery Temper, Lightning Bolt, and Fireblast, the deck aims to reduce the opponent's life total to zero as quickly as possible. Additionally, cards like Faithless Looting, Lava Dart, Grab the Prize, and Highway Robbery help maintain card advantage and provide additional reach to finish off the opponent.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to establish control over the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy with counterspells and removal spells. The deck also aims to maintain card advantage through card draw spells like Brainstorm and Deep Analysis. The creatures in the deck are mainly used as blockers or win conditions, such as Gurmag Angler. The deck also includes some lifegain and graveyard interaction with Unexpected Fangs and Thought Scour. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and control the tempo of the game until victory is achieved.

The deck focuses on utilizing gate cards to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It includes plenty of removal spells and card draw to maintain board presence and outvalue the opponent. The Gates also provide mana fixing to ensure consistent access to all colors of mana. The deck aims to control the game through countering spells, generating card advantage, and removing threats from the opponent's side of the battlefield. It also utilizes lifegain and protection spells to stabilize against aggressive strategies.

The deck focuses on quickly playing artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. It utilizes cards like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar to quickly build a strong board presence. Cards like Krark-Clan Shaman and Galvanic Blast help to control the opponent's board while dealing damage. The deck also includes card draw options like Ichor Wellspring and Thoughtcast to ensure a steady stream of resources. Overall, the goal is to outpace the opponent and deal efficient damage to secure a win in a fast-paced Pauper 1 vs 1 match.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to the battlefield and leveraging their synergy to overwhelm opponents with aggressive threats. By utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar, it aims to establish a solid board presence early on. Additionally, cards like Galvanic Blast and Krark-Clan Shaman provide removal and direct damage, while Thoughtcast helps to maintain card advantage. The inclusion of various artifact synergies and utility cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Toxin Analysis further enhance the deck's overall strategy of efficiently generating value from artifacts.

This deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of creatures with direct damage abilities and burn spells. By efficiently using low-cost spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, along with creature abilities like Guttersnipe and Sneaky Snacker, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and bring their life total to zero before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help to maintain card advantage and keep up the pressure.

The main concept of this Mono Blue Aggro deck is to efficiently and aggressively control the board while rapidly deploying threats to pressure the opponent. By utilizing cheap and versatile countermagic like Counterspell and Force Spike, alongside card draw and selection spells such as Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to maintain tempo and card advantage. With evasive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent backed up by disruptive spells, the deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Growth Spiral and Explore to play big creature threats like Annoyed Altisaur and Avenging Hunter. The deck also has card draw and bounce spells to maintain tempo and card advantage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while being able to keep up card advantage and flexibility through card draw and bounce spells.

This deck focuses on swarming the board with small, cheap creatures to overwhelm the opponent in quick succession. The key strategy is to consistently play low-cost creatures like Kor Skyfisher, Novice Inspector, and Thraben Inspector to build a wide board presence. Cards like Prismatic Strands and Thraben Charm help protect your creatures and provide combat tricks to maintain board control. The deck also includes Anthem effects like Guardians' Pledge and Ramosian Rally to boost the power of your creatures for a final push.
